name: GENITOURINARY DIABETES MELLITUS
definition: defined as persistent proteinuria (> 500 mg of albumin/24 hours) + retinopathy + elevated

demographics.Prevalence: 35-45% of IDDM; < 20% of NIDDM; M > F

dominant_finding: renal enlargement (= renal hypertrophy with glomerular expansion)
distribution: renal enlargement (= renal hypertrophy with glomerular expansion)
discriminating_features: renal enlargement (= renal hypertrophy with glomerular expansion)
diffuse cortical hyperechogenicity with gradual loss of corticomedullary differentiation
contrast material may induce renal failure (= rise in serum creatinine level 1-5 days after

general: renal enlargement (= renal hypertrophy with glomerular expansion)
diffuse cortical hyperechogenicity with gradual loss of corticomedullary differentiation
contrast material may induce renal failure (= rise in serum creatinine level 1-5 days after

clinical.Cx: vesicoureteral reflux, recurrent pyelonephritis, pyohydronephrosis, overflow
